top_bullish: Top Gainers & Losers on May 6: Coforge, Vodafone Idea, HFCL, BPCL, Tata Motors, IndiGo among top gainers
Raymond Realty shares hit 20% upper circuit after strong Q4 results; up 51% since March low
Sensex jumps 940 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,300. Key factors behind stock market rise explained
top_bearish: MCX tech glitch: Zerodha flags order issues across brokers, advises caution for commodity trading
Crude oil prices hit a lower circuit on US-Iran peace hopes; Brent oil below $104 per barrel
Mint Explainer: Can Sebi’s GIFT City pivot fix India’s weak appetite for foreign debt?

articles.title: Maharatna PSU Power Grid Corporation of India sets board meeting date to declare Q4 results 2026
articles.summary: Maharatna PSU Power Grid has set Saturday, 16 May, as the date to consider Q4 results along with dividend payout.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 6: Coforge, Vodafone Idea, HFCL, BPCL, Tata Motors, IndiGo among top gainers
articles.summary: On May 6, Indian markets closed higher with the Nifty 50 up 1.24% and the Sensex gaining 1.22%, driven by easing US-Iran tensions. Notable gains were seen in technology and auto stocks, although several shares faced declines amid profit booking.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: MCX tech glitch: Zerodha flags order issues across brokers, advises caution for commodity trading
articles.summary: Zerodha told clients that some orders on MCX may get rejected or experience delays in status updates due to the glitch. It advised traders in the commodities segment to exercise caution until the issue is resolved.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Crude oil prices hit a lower circuit on US-Iran peace hopes; Brent oil below $104 per barrel
articles.summary: Crude oil prices fell over 6% to $102.79 per barrel after Trump announced progress in US-Iran negotiations. The halt in marine traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has contributed to rising prices, while US crude stockpiles have decreased for three consecutive weeks.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Mint Explainer: Can Sebi’s GIFT City pivot fix India’s weak appetite for foreign debt?
articles.summary: A regulatory shift could soon bring dollar-denominated bonds to your screen—if platforms and investors are willing to take the leap.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Raymond Realty shares hit 20% upper circuit after strong Q4 results; up 51% since March low
articles.summary: Raymond Realty shares hit a five-month high of ₹569.60, locked at a 20% upper circuit. Q4FY26 revenue surged 51% to ₹1,157 crore, with a net profit increase of 44%. Full-year revenue rose 29% to ₹2,991 crore, despite a slight drop in EBITDA margin.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sensex jumps 940 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,300. Key factors behind stock market rise explained
articles.summary: The Sensex ended at 77,958.52, up 941 points, or 1.22%, while the Nifty 50 settled at 24,330.95, rising 298 points, or 1.24%. Investors earned about ₹6 lakh crore in a day.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Lump sum vs SWP: What is the right way to withdraw money from mutual funds after retirement?
articles.summary: Redeeming from equity during a market downturn locks in losses permanently — the corpus never fully recovers. SWPs from debt or hybrid funds avoid this, preserving equity's compounding runway.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: AI stocks rally pushes S&P 500, Nasdaq, Kospi to record highs: Are valuations still justified?
articles.summary: The rally in semiconductor stocks pushed the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index up 4.2% to a record high. The index has now gained 55% so far in 2026. Both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite also closed at record highs, supported by gains in AI and semiconductor stocks.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: KPI Green Energy share price jumps 11% after Q4 results today
articles.summary: KPI Green Energy share price jumped 11% on Wednesday, 6 May, after the company reported a strong set of numbers in the March quarter FY26.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Ruchit Jain of Motilal Oswal suggests Granules India, Nippon Life, and SRF shares to buy for the short term
articles.summary: The Nifty 50 and Sensex increased on May 6, supported by a government credit guarantee scheme for businesses. Investor sentiment improved due to positive earnings reports and falling oil prices, suggesting resilience in markets despite recent challenges.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: L&T's wings clipped by geopolitical tensions, recovery likely in H2 of FY27
articles.summary: Larsen & Toubro faces challenges from geopolitical tensions, impacting its revenue and operating margins. Despite a record order book of ₹7.4 trillion, delays in projects and rising costs have prompted a cautious outlook for FY27.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Middle East war threatens to derail Indian economic growth: Should stock market investors be worried?
articles.summary: As the Middle East war escalates, India's economic growth faces uncertainty. Experts warn that rising crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions could lead to modest stock market returns and increased volatility.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: FIIs sell Indian stocks worth ₹1.98 lakh crore in just four months. Can this trend reverse in May?
articles.summary: So far in May, FIIs have extended their selling streak, offloading shares worth ₹5,052 crore. India’s relative underperformance over the past 12-18 months, elevated market valuations, and now the US-Iran war have driven FIIs away from India.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Mahindra's next challenge: maintaining its growth lead
articles.summary: Mahindra's capacity expansion plans, a deep SUV pipeline, and improving EV economics continue to support management’s confidence in delivering 15-20% earnings per share CAGR over the next five years despite macro uncertainty
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Value 360 Communications IPO Day 3: Issue booked 77% so far. Check GMP, issue details, more
articles.summary: Value 360 Communications IPO runs from May 4-6, priced at ₹95-98 per share. The company offers marketing and PR solutions in India. Shares allocation is on May 7, with listing on May 11. Subscription status is 77%, with proceeds aimed at working capital and technology investments.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: L&T share price falls nearly 4% after Q4 results. Time to buy or sell the infra stock?
articles.summary: L&T share price has gained over 5% in one month and has fallen over 3% in three months. The large-cap stock has rallied 18% in one year and has surged 65% in three years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vodafone Idea, YES Bank, HFCL, JP Power, Filatex Fashions among the most traded stocks today, 6 May 2026
articles.summary: Most traded stocks today: Vodafone Idea, YES Bank, HFCL, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), Filatex Fashions, Meesho, Vedanta, and Suzlon Energy were among the most traded stocks, or most active stocks in terms of volume, on the NSE on Wednesday.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Europe Gas Traders Buy Options to Hedge for Winter Price Spike
articles.summary: Some European natural gas traders are already hedging against a spike in prices next winter as the war in the Middle East continues to disrupt supplies.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Paytm Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Paytm share price gains ahead of earnings; what to expect
articles.summary: Paytm Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Ahead of the Q4 results, Paytm shares rose 2.5% on the BSE. Analysts expect revenue to remain largely flat quarter-on-quarter in the range of ₹2,180– ₹2,500 crore, with gross merchandise value (GMV) likely to grow by around 4% QoQ.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Hero MotoCorp share price rallies over 3% after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold the stock?
articles.summary: Hero MotoCorp share price has fallen 1% in one month and has dropped 12% in three months. The stock has declined 5% in six months and has gained 30% in one year. Hero MotoCorp stock price has jumped 98% in three years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 6 May in Delhi, Mumbai and Kolkata
articles.summary: MCX gold June futures rose by nearly ₹2,000, or more than 1.1%, today, to ₹1,51,810 per 10 grams, whereas MCX silver July futures jumped by ₹6,309, or nearly 3%, to ₹2,50,924 per kg in early deals on Wednesday.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Voda Idea shares surge 4%, extend rise to 3rd day: AGR relief to KM Birla's return — Key factors behind rally explained
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea stock price gained 4.07% to hit the day's high of ₹11.24 today — its highest level since 19 February. Meanwhile, in three sessions, the telco has risen almost 10%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: United Breweries shares fall nearly 5% after Q4 results. Is it time to buy or sell?
articles.summary: United Breweries shares fell nearly 5% on May 6 after Q4 results showed a 4.2% rise in net profit to ₹101.87 crore, despite a slight decline in revenue from operations. Overall FY26 net profit declined 6.55% amid mixed performance.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bajaj Auto Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Two-wheeler stock jumps 2% ahead of results — Dividend, buyback announcements eyed
articles.summary: Bajaj Auto Q4 Results LIVE: Two-wheeler major Bajaj Auto is slated to announce its Q4 results 2026 today. Ahead of earnings, the auto stock traded higher, with investors keenly eyeing the announcement around buyback and dividend.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Coforge share price jumps 10% on strong Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold?
articles.summary: Coforge shares opened at ₹1,261 apiece today as compared to the previous close of ₹1,168 on Tuesday, which is 10% growth after its strong Q4 results. Check experts' opinion on whether you should buy or sell Coforge shares after Q4 results.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO allotment date likely today. GMP, steps to check share allotment status online
articles.summary: OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO allotment date is likely today, May 6. OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO allotment status online check can be done through the websites of BSE and NSE, and also on the official portal of the IPO registrar. Kfin Technologies is the OnEMI Technology Solutions IPO registrar.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: PNB share price climbs almost 4% after Q4 results: Should you buy, sell, or hold the PSU bank stock?
articles.summary: PNB share price climbed nearly 4% in morning deals on the BSE on Wednesday, 6 May, a day after the PSU bank reported its March quarter (Q4FY26) results, posting healthy profit growth.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil prices fall for second day amid US-Iran peace talks hopes; Brent below below $110/bbl mark
articles.summary: Brent crude futures for July dropped $1.52, or 1.38%, to $108.35 per barrel, following a 4% fall in the previous session. Meanwhile, MCX crude oil prices fell over 1.52% to ₹9,551 per barrel.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: M&M shares rise nearly 3% after Q4 results, emerge as top Nifty 50 gainer. Should you buy, sell or hold?
articles.summary: Mahindra & Mahindra shares rose nearly 3% after reporting a 48.5% increase in Q4 consolidated profit to ₹5,259.91 crore. The company expects growth in the tractor and SUV segments for FY27, supported by strong consumer sentiment and product launches.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold rate jumps over 1% on MCX amid a weaker dollar, easing crude oil prices; possible US-Iran peace talks in focus
articles.summary: MCX gold June futures rose by nearly ₹2,000, or more than 1%, to ₹1,51,740 per 10 grams, while MCX silver July futures jumped by ₹6,300, or nearly 3%, to ₹2,50,724 per kg in early deals on Wednesday.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Rupee opens 24 paise higher at 95.04 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee strengthened by 24 paise to 95.04 against the US dollar, aided by falling crude oil prices and expectations of increased dollar inflows. Brent crude prices decreased to about $108 per barrel amid mixed US-Iran tension signals.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Q4 results 2026: Bajaj Auto to Paytm among companies to declare Q4 results today
articles.summary: Q4 results 2026: Around 60 companies will declare their March quarter results on Wednesday. Checkout Q4 previews, along with full list of companies to release Q4 results today.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Rupee plunges to new low, some see signs of undervaluation against EM peers
articles.summary: While the rupee has weakened significantly against the greenback, its Real Effective Exchange Rate (REER) tells a more balanced story of competitiveness against major trading partners
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Mankind Pharma to CG Power - Jay Thakkar suggests 3 stocks to buy or sell for short-term in F&O segment
articles.summary: The GIFT Nifty indicates a positive start for the Indian stock market, trading at 24,279. Benchmark indices BSE Sensex and Nifty 50 ended lower due to profit booking. Broader markets showed resilience, with recommendations for Mankind Pharma, CG Power, and ABB futures.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: How India’s growth story has left its workers behind
articles.summary: Noida’s unrest highlights India’s structural crisis: skipping manufacturing for services has left a low-skilled workforce with stagnant real wages, poor living and working conditions, and diminishing bargaining power.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India’s services sector recovers lost ground, domestic market fuels growth in April: HSBC India Services PMI
articles.summary: India's services sector showed recovery in April, with the HSBC PMI rising to 58.8. Increased output and new business orders were noted, alongside a shift to domestic suppliers. The composite PMI also rose to 58.2, indicating growth momentum across sectors.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: US Envoy Sergio Gor confirms Marco Rubio will visit India soon to ‘build even stronger ties’
articles.summary: US envoy Sergio Gor announced that Indian companies plan to invest over $20.5 billion in various sectors, contributing to job creation and stronger supply chains. The SelectUSA Investment Summit promotes foreign direct investment, connecting global business leaders with US economic developers.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: West Asia war may briefly dent India's growth as fundamentals strong: Memani
articles.summary: CII President Rajiv Memani, who is also the regional managing partner of EY Africa-India and chair of EY Growth Markets Council, said that the challenge before businesses is to strike a balance between the costs that they can absorb and those that must be passed on to consumers.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Govt clears ₹50,000-crore package to boost credit flow and support businesses
articles.summary: The government-backed loan support scheme will facilitate an additional credit flow of up to ₹2.55 trillion to the economy, including ₹5,000 crore specifically for the aviation sector, a government statement said.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: SCBs clock 15.9% credit growth in FY26, led by services, MSMEs, retail
articles.summary: The 497-basis-point jump reflects sustained economic momentum and rising demand for credit across sectors.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India plans to award construction-ready highway contracts, with all approvals in place, to curb delays
articles.summary: In a bid to eliminate persistent highway project delays, MoRTH is proposing stricter pre-award filters, ensuring all critical land and structural clearances are in place before contracts are awarded. This shift aims to make highway projects more execution-ready.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Why RBI wants to keep India's gold at home
articles.summary: RBI repatriated over 100 tonnes of gold to India in the six months to March, taking the total gold reserves stored locally to 680 tonnes. Why is the central bank bringing gold back home?
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: India among most resilient as global shocks test emerging markets: Moody’s Ratings
articles.summary: India and Thailand are well placed to manage future shocks because monetary policy frameworks are clear and predictable, inflation expectations are well anchored, and exchange rates can adjust when needed, Moody’s Ratings said.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: India’s fertilizer subsidy reaches ₹2.17 trillion in FY26 due to West Asia war, may rise by a fifth in FY27
articles.summary: As the war in West Asia disrupts supply chains, India's fertilizer subsidy may exceed ₹2.17 trillion in FY27. This trend raises concerns about fiscal discipline and food inflation.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: RBI reshuffles top deck: New DG Rohit Jain takes charge, portfolios realigned
articles.summary: Rohit Jain has been appointed deputy governor of the Reserve Bank of India, leading to a portfolio reshuffle among governors. The changes, effective 4 May, aim to enhance oversight of fintech and adapt to evolving financial priorities amid global volatility.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Centre plans 3.25 mn ha shift to chemical-free farming by FY31
articles.summary: The department of expenditure in coordination with the agriculture ministry, is drafting a proposal to create 65,000 clusters of 50 hectares each under the National Mission on Natural Farming
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Indian private sector new order growth quickens in April but remains slowest in 4 years: PMI survey shows
articles.summary: After losing some momentum in March due to West Asia conflict, growth across India's private sector expanded at a quicker rate at the start of new fiscal year in April.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil prices subdued after Trump says US plans to help stranded ships cross Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices held near $108 as Trump announced ‘Project Freedom’ to guide stranded ships through the Strait of Hormuz, though blockade risks and fragile peace prospects kept markets on edge.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Rural job scheme demand dips by over a third in April—here’s why
articles.summary: The decline in rural work demand in April may be a continuation of similar declines seen over the past few months, though it could also reflect implementation challenges with the VB G-RAM-G.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil slips after Trump says US will help free ships stranded in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices fell on Monday after President Trump announced efforts to free stranded ships in the Strait of Hormuz, yet remained above $100 due to ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions. Brent crude dropped to $107.53, while U.S. West Texas Intermediate fell to $101.10 amid stalled peace negotiations.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Govt says auto fuel shortage rumour led to panic buys, assures stocks adequate
articles.summary: While cooking gas supplies remained strained due to the West Asia war, household demand had been being prioritized and no shortages have been reported, the petroleum ministry said.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: OPEC members increase oil production quota by 188,000 bpd, no word on UAE's withdrawal amid war in West Asia
articles.summary: Saudi Arabia, Russia, and five other OPEC members increased their oil production quota by 188,000 barrels per day, despite the UAE's recent withdrawal. Analysts suggest this move aims to project stability amid ongoing market disruptions from the Mideast conflict.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Will the West Asia war accelerate the age of electricity? Explained in charts
articles.summary: The 1973 oil crisis dramatically changed the way that economies used fossil fuels such as petroleum. The ongoing US-Iran war could also reshape energy usage—for good.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: The week in charts: New Zealand FTA, steel exports, boardroom gender disparity
articles.summary: In this weekly Plain Facts compilation, we present to you data-based insights, with easy-to-read charts, to help you delve deeper into the stories reported by Mint in the week gone by.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India’s green energy sector may be hit by power regulator’s stricter performance standards
articles.summary: According to developers, the new deviation rules are hard to follow, since unlike coal or hydro, wind and solar are unstable sources of power.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Eating out, international travel costlier after commercial LPG, ATF price hike
articles.summary: International travel, too, might get more expensive, with prices of aviation turbine fuel (ATF) for international flights being raised, according to a statement by state-run refiner Indian Oil Corporation.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Centre, states collect record ₹2.43 trillion in gross April GST revenue
articles.summary: Last April, the Centre and states had collected ₹2.37 trillion in GST revenue before adjusting for refunds, but the figures are not strictly comparable because of the GST cuts in September 2025.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Government lowers export duty on diesel, ATF
articles.summary: Windfall levies were first imposed in 2022 during the peak of the Russia-Ukraine war and were withdrawn in 2024.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India plans ₹51,000 crore push to procure 62 ships amid West Asia crisis
articles.summary: The government wants to significantly scale up India’s shipping capacity, including container vessels, LPG carriers, crude oil tankers, and environment-friendly green tugs, as geopolitical tensions disrupt maritime trade routes.
articles.label: BEARISH
